title: Iron Man Armor
description: Fly, fight, and mine like Iron Man — unleash the full power of your Repulsor Suit.
body:
The Iron Man Armor Set transforms you into a high-tech powerhouse.
Soar through the skies, fire repulsor blasts, scan enemies through walls, and tear through caves with explosive rockets.
Each armor piece provides unique enhancements, but when combined, they unlock the full suit’s potential.
